items.prompt: A useful first look at a failed run log is…
choices: Delete the log and recompile blindly
tail the end (and grep for error/warn)
items.explain: The end of the log usually shows the stopping failure; grep finds the cues.

items.prompt: "iverilog: command not found" is best classified as…
choices: A flake that needs more seeds
items.explain: Missing tools are env failures—fix PATH/install, not RTL first.

items.prompt: An expect/got mismatch in the testbench is usually a real fail, not a missing license.
items.explain: Scoreboard mismatches point at design/test until proven otherwise.

items.prompt: grep -i error sample.log is useful because…
choices: It finds ERROR/Error/error without caring about case
It only works on binary files
items.explain: -i makes the search case-insensitive so you catch mixed-case tags.
